data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"c804-9ccf","generatedAt":"2026-04-18T11:07:08.864400Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Retro 2026-04-16: Error resilience \u2014 systematic fail-open coverage","description":"DSO plugin hooks use 3 inconsistent error handling patterns: silent fail-open (5 post-* dispatchers), logging fail-open with copy-pasted JSONL traps (~24 inline occurrences), and no trap at all (7 pre-* dispatchers).","successCriteria":["A shared _dso_hook_err_handler function exists in hooks/lib/hook-error-handler.sh that all fail-open hooks use","All 7 pre-* dispatchers and all 5 post-* dispatchers have fail-open ERR traps using the shared handler","All ~24 existing copy-pasted logging traps migrated to shared handler","Error logs written to ~/.claude/logs/dso-hook-errors.jsonl with enriched fields: timestamp, hook name, line number, repo root, plugin version, bash version, OS. Legacy path deprecated; all readers and test fixtures updated to new path","Enforcement hooks explicitly excluded with machine-enforced boundary (header convention + pre-commit check)","All existing tests pass","At least one new test verifies ERR trigger produces correctly-structured JSONL entry with all enriched fields"]},"stories":[{"id":"cf83-514c","title":"As a hook developer, I can source a shared ERR handler that writes enriched JSONL to a canonical log path","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When this story is complete, hooks/lib/hook-error-handler.sh exists with _dso_hook_err_handler() that can be sourced from any bash hook","When this story is complete, ERR trigger writes enriched JSONL to ~/.claude/logs/dso-hook-errors.jsonl with all 7 fields","When this story is complete, session-safety-check.sh reads from both new and legacy paths during migration window","When this story is complete, test-session-safety.sh and test-session-misc-no-jq.sh use new log path","When this story is complete, one test confirms correct JSONL structure with all enriched fields"],"considerations":["[Reliability] ERR trap inheritance requires set -E (errtrace) in sourcing scripts","[Reliability] ~/.claude/logs/ directory created lazily before first write","[Testing] Test fixtures must use TEST_HOME isolation"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"A shared _dso_hook_err_handler function exists in hooks/lib/hook-error-handler.sh"},{"id":"a6d6-ee6b","title":"As a pre-tool-use hook user, all 7 pre-* dispatchers fail open on unexpected crashes via shared ERR handler","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, all 7 pre-* dispatchers source hook-error-handler.sh with fail-open guard and register shared handler as ERR trap","When complete, pre-* dispatcher crash logs JSONL and exits 0"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Source guard pattern required: source ... 2>/dev/null || true","[Reliability] ERR traps in pre-* dispatchers use exit 0 semantics"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["cf83-514c"],"satisfiesCriterion":"All 7 pre-* dispatchers have fail-open ERR traps using the shared handler"},{"id":"24bc-18fc","title":"As a post-tool-use hook user, all 5 post-* dispatchers fail open with JSONL error logging on unexpected crashes","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, all 5 post-* dispatchers use shared handler replacing silent trap 'exit 0' ERR","When complete, post-* dispatcher crash produces JSONL log entry"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Same source guard pattern as S2","[Testing] Verify behavior change does not affect tests asserting absence of log entries"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["cf83-514c"],"satisfiesCriterion":"All 5 post-* dispatchers have fail-open ERR traps using the shared handler"},{"id":"b765-e339","title":"As a hook library maintainer, all inline copy-pasted ERR logging traps in hook libs and top-level hooks are consolidated into the shared handler","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, no file outside hook-error-handler.sh defines HOOK_ERROR_LOG pointing to legacy path","When complete, all ~24 inline logging traps replaced with shared handler registration or documented exceptions","When complete, run-hook.sh writes to ~/.claude/logs/dso-hook-errors.jsonl"],"considerations":["[Correctness] post-functions.sh uses trap 'return 0' ERR \u2014 must preserve function-scope exit semantics","[Correctness] review-gate-bypass-sentinel.sh enforcement trap - ERR patterns must NOT be migrated","[Reliability] Source hook-error-handler.sh at dispatcher level only, not inside lib functions"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["cf83-514c"],"satisfiesCriterion":"All ~24 existing copy-pasted logging traps migrated to shared handler"},{"id":"348b-5e2c","title":"As a hook developer, enforcement hooks are protected from accidental fail-open handler inclusion by a machine-enforced annotation-driven boundary","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, all 6 enforcement hooks have # hook-boundary: enforcement header","When complete, pre-commit check blocks commits where annotated enforcement hooks source hook-error-handler.sh (annotation-driven)"],"considerations":["[Maintainability] Check is annotation-driven: scans for header, not hardcoded file list","[Correctness] S5 should land after S1 so S2/S3/S4 authors get enforcement protection during their work"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["cf83-514c"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Enforcement hooks explicitly excluded with machine-enforced boundary"},{"id":"8657-b86c","title":"Update project docs to reflect shared hook error handler and new log path","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, no reference to ~/.claude/hook-error-log.jsonl (legacy path) remains in project docs","When complete, CLAUDE.md documents _dso_hook_err_handler pattern and # hook-boundary: enforcement convention"],"considerations":[],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["cf83-514c","a6d6-ee6b","24bc-18fc","b765-e339","348b-5e2c"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Legacy path deprecated; all readers and test fixtures updated to new path"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":6,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["cf83-514c","a6d6-ee6b","24bc-18fc","b765-e339","348b-5e2c","8657-b86c"]}}
